# Copilot Instructions

- Keep this project minimal and static-first.
- Frontend lives in `src/` (HTML/CSS/JS only).
- Blog content lives in `content/posts/*.md`.
- Python build script in `scripts/build.py` generates production output in `dist/`.
- Netlify deploy uses `netlify.toml` with `dist` publish directory.
- Avoid adding frameworks unless explicitly requested.
